title: The Muscle Model — How Ego Depletion Works

visual_prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—stands solemnly beside a giant ornate hourglass that towers three times its height. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a contemplative, somber expression as it watches the hourglass drain. Slung over its shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm catching the ethereal glow of the hourglass. The hourglass itself is crafted from dark polished wood and brass fittings, and inside, sparkling iridescent energy particles — glowing cyan, magenta, and gold — pour steadily from the upper chamber to the lower, representing willpower draining away. The upper chamber is nearly empty, only a few brilliant motes swirling above the narrow neck. The background is a deep twilight gradient, no text

visual_prompts.narration: He proposed that willpower works like a muscle
visual_prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—flexes one tiny arm upward in a classic strongman pose, its round bicep bulging comically and glowing with brilliant cyan and gold energy visible through a stylized cross-section cutaway. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows raised confidently and a proud, determined grin showing maximum effort. Slung over its other shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm catching the radiant muscle-glow. The cross-section of the flexed bicep reveals glowing fibers pulsing with electric energy, each strand lit up like fiber optics in vibrant teal and magenta. Energy radiates outward from the muscle in concentric rings, and tiny lightning bolts crackle around the arm, emphasizing raw willpower strength at full capacity, no text

visual_prompts.narration: — use it, and it gets tired.
visual_prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. The same small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—now holds the same arm up but the bicep has completely deflated and droops sadly like a wrinkled balloon. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient that has noticeably dimmed, framed by delicate purple eyebrows sagging in dismay and a defeated frown. Slung over its other shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm hanging listlessly. The cross-section cutaway of the arm now shows the same muscle fibers but completely darkened and grey, the energy drained away, with only the faintest flicker of residual light remaining in a few scattered strands. Where energy rings once radiated outward, now only faint dashed circles suggest where power used to be. The overall color palette has shifted to muted, tired tones, no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—pushes with all its might against an enormous grey boulder on a steep incline, its tiny feet digging into the rocky slope for traction. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows locked in strained exertion and teeth gritted with intense effort. Slung over its shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm swinging with the physical strain. Sweat drops burst from its brow in comic-style arcs, speed lines accent the pushing motion, and the boulder casts a massive shadow over the character emphasizing the overwhelming scale of the effort. The incline stretches upward into clouds, suggesting an endless Sisyphean task. Dust and small pebbles scatter beneath the character's feet, no text

visual_prompts.narration: draws from a shared internal battery,
visual_prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A stylized cross-section view of a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—shows its internal anatomy reimagined as an energy system. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a neutral, diagram-like expression. Slung over its shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm catching the internal glow. At the center of the character's chest, a single brilliant glowing orb — like a miniature sun in warm gold and cyan — pulses with radiant energy. From this core, multiple luminous pathways branch outward like a circuit board, reaching to the brain, the arms, the legs, and the heart, each pathway pulsing with flowing energy particles traveling from the single shared source to power every function simultaneously, no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. The same cross-section view of the small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid shows the central glowing orb now flickering weakly, sputtering like a candle in the wind, its once-brilliant gold and cyan light reduced to a faint amber ember. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient that mirrors the fading core, framed by delicate purple eyebrows drooping with concern and a worried frown. Slung over its shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm dimming alongside the core. The branching pathways that once carried brilliant energy are going dark one by one in sequence — the pathway to the brain flickers and extinguishes, then the one to the arms dims, creating a cascading blackout effect. Only one or two pathways still carry the faintest trickle of dying light, while the rest have gone completely cold and grey, no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—stands at a bright morning breakfast table and pushes both tiny hands firmly against a giant floating glazed donut that hovers before it, three times the size of its head, glistening with sugary glaze and rainbow sprinkles. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows furrowed with effortful resistance and a tight-lipped grimace of self-denial. In the character's chest, the glowing battery indicator visibly drops down one notch with a small downward arrow, showing the cost of this single act of resistance. The breakfast setting is warm and sunny, contrasting with the internal struggle, no text

visual_prompts.narration: and you might have less willpower
visual_prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A close-up of a stylized vertical battery gauge rendered in sleek, futuristic chrome fills the center of the frame. The gauge has five segmented sections from bottom to top, each section previously filled with glowing energy in gradient colors — green at the top, yellow in the middle, red at the bottom. The topmost segment has just gone dark, leaving four segments still lit but the overall charge clearly reduced. A small downward-pointing arrow pulses next to the gauge in warning amber, indicating the recent depletion. The background features a soft blurred montage of daily life scenarios — breakfast, commuting, working — rendered as ghostly silhouettes suggesting all the moments that drain this single shared resource throughout the day. Tiny energy particles drift downward past the gauge like falling embers, visualizing the steady consumption of willpower reserves over time, no text

visual_prompts.narration: to stay calm in a meeting.
visual_prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—sits at a long conference table surrounded by blurred chibi office figures, its face turning progressively red from the bottom up like a rising thermometer. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows twitching with barely contained frustration and a mouth clenched tight as steam jets shoot from both sides of its head in classic comic anger style. Slung over the back of its office chair is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm vibrating with the character's rising tension. The conference table is littered with scattered papers, and the other figures gesture animatedly, oblivious to the character's internal meltdown. The internal battery now shows another segment depleted, glowing faintly in the chest area, no text

visual_prompts.narration: Force yourself through a boring report,
visual_prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—sits at a desk piled impossibly high with thick stacks of papers and documents that tower above it, its eyelids drooping heavily as it forces itself to read through the massive boring report. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, now fighting to stay open, framed by delicate purple eyebrows weighed down by monotony and a mouth stretched in an exhausted yawn. Slung over its chair is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm barely glinting. The internal battery visible through its chest has drained further, now showing only two segments remaining and pulsing with a warning amber glow. Tiny Z-shaped sleep symbols float above its head, and the papers seem to multiply endlessly before its weary gaze, no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—frantically clicks a large glowing orange purchase button on a tablet screen with wild, unrestrained abandon, its eyes wide with manic impulsive energy. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, now swirling with chaotic, uncontrolled excitement, framed by delicate purple eyebrows raised in reckless glee and a wide, slightly unhinged grin. Slung behind it is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm bouncing wildly. Shopping bags in every color materialize and pop into existence around the character in rapid succession — bursting out of the screen with dynamic motion lines and sparkle effects. The internal battery is nearly empty, down to its last red sliver, and the character has clearly lost all capacity to resist temptation, no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—sits in the center of an absurd mountain of unnecessary purchases that surrounds it on all sides — oversized novelty items, random gadgets, stacked boxes, bizarre accessories, and impulse-buy trinkets piled to the ceiling. The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A clean, elegant, beautifully designed diagram floats in the center of the frame against a soft cream-white background, depicting the battery model of willpower with satisfying visual simplicity. A single stylized battery icon sits at the center, connected by graceful flowing lines to four surrounding circular icons representing different daily demands — each line showing energy flowing outward from the central source. The entire diagram glows with a warm, harmonious golden light, and the lines have a pleasing symmetry and balance that makes the concept feel instantly understandable. Subtle geometric patterns and golden ratio spirals decorate the background, reinforcing the mathematical elegance of the theory. The color scheme is refined and minimal — soft golds, clean whites, gentle teals — and the overall composition radiates intellectual beauty and the satisfying clarity of a theory that just makes sense at first glance, no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. The elegant battery diagram from the previous frame now multiplies exponentially across the image, spreading outward from the center in a viral network pattern that covers an entire stylized globe. Hundreds of copies of the diagram replicate and branch across continents, connected by glowing teal and gold neural-network-style lines that pulse with transmitted information. The globe rotates slightly, rendered in a semi-transparent wireframe style, with the diagram nodes lighting up across every region — spreading from a single origin point outward like a digital wildfire. Each node pulses and glows as it activates, creating a cascading wave of adoption that sweeps across the planet. The background transitions from the clean cream of the single diagram to a deep cosmic space vista, emphasizing the global scale of the theory's influence and reach across the scientific and popular imagination worldwide, no text
